checks.desc: Product 27's new price 1299.99 is present after the single-field edit on a non-first batch.
Total seed rows remain exactly 120 (40 products + 40 users + 40 orders) — no collateral row loss from a single-field edit.
All 40 product rows are still present after editing product 27.
Schema is intact: products, users, orders CREATE TABLE statements all preserved.
